classification.reconstruction_intent: asset-preserving hybrid reconstruction with editable structure, labels, and formulas
classification.notes: Photos, camera-grid frames, noisy latent examples, model-output thumbnails, and distinctive model marks are source-preserved raster assets. Panels, arrows, cards, labels, and equations are editable.
